# kemp_waf_custom_data (Data Source)

Looks up a custom legacy WAF data file stored on the LoadMaster by filename.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "kemp_waf_custom_data" "existing" {
  filename = "waf_blocklist.data"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `filename` (String) Filename of the WAF custom data file.
